name: BL Lesson: I Can’t Defy Mr. Yukinojo
original_name: BLレッスン -雪之丞さんにはさからえない-
overview: A rising actor lands an unexpected role in a BL drama and begins training under a famed “BL expert.” As rehearsals blur the line between script and reality, he’s left wondering—are these feelings just acting, or something real?
